subcodes.first_line: O beloved of my heart! Though a thousand leagues of mountain, plain and desert lie between thee and me as a barrier, yet from the sweet-scented breeze [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب قلبی اگرچه هزار فرسنگ کوه و دشت و بیابان میان ما و تو حائل لکن از نفحه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
